cleavage agent: The tryptic peptides were dissolved in 0.1% formic acid
fragmentation method: the precursors were fragmented in CID with collision energy from 20ev–59ev
instrument: the timsTOF Pro2 mass spectrometer (Bruker DaltonicsTM) was coupled online with the nanoElute.
ionization type: the peptides were subjected to NSI source followed by tandem mass spectrometry
